evidenceTypesSupplied: Observed public sample-report rows for output-format parity
sectionsUnavailable: Authenticated Sequencing.com marketplace detail-page extraction is not available yet.
No calibrated autosomal ancestry percentage model is supplied for the local fixture.
No Y-DNA paternal-line haplogroup evidence is supplied for the local fixture.
No family matching, relative matching, migration path, or exact homeland model is supplied.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A broad East Asian reference-panel similarity summary is available, but no calibrated ancestry percentage model is supplied.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is broad reference-panel context only. It is not a precise ethnicity percentage, homeland, nationality, community label, or identity statement.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived maternal-line mtDNA haplogroup M7b1a1 call is available. This follows one maternal line only.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: An mtDNA haplogroup describes one maternal lineage. It does not represent all ancestors, overall ancestry, identity, or health status.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Y-DNA paternal-line haplogroup evidence is unavailable in this fixture and is not inferred.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: A missing Y-DNA row means this report cannot provide paternal-line haplogroup context for this run.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Your Maternal Mitochondrial Haplogroup is L
resultRows.description: The sample cover-style page shows a direct maternal mitochondrial haplogroup result and explanatory examples for L subclades.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF page labeled Genetic Ancestry with Haplogroups; this is observed sample content, not the local fixture's mtDNA result.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Your Paternal Y-Chromosome Haplogroup is R1b
resultRows.description: The sample page shows a direct paternal Y-chromosome haplogroup result and explanatory examples for R1b lineages.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF page labeled Genetic Ancestry with Haplogroups; this is observed sample content, not inferred Y-DNA evidence for the local fixture.

resultRows.description: The sample Ancestry Composition page shows an admixture row with European and Asian percentages and a description of European, Asian, and African ancestor categories.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF Ancestry Composition page; exact percentages are sample output examples and must not be invented for a local run without calibrated ancestry evidence.

resultRows.description: The sample Ancestry Composition table shows British or Irish at 38% under the European Northwest description.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF Ancestry Composition table; this is observed sample output structure, not a local identity claim.

resultRows.description: The sample Ancestry Composition table shows French or German at 10% under the European Northwest description.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF Ancestry Composition table; this is observed sample output structure, not a local identity claim.

resultRows.description: The sample Ancestry Composition table shows Chinese Han at 38% under the Asian Chinese description.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF Ancestry Composition table; this is observed sample output structure, not a local identity claim.

resultRows.description: The sample Ancestry Composition table shows Chinese Dai at 8% under the Asian Chinese description.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF Ancestry Composition table; this is observed sample output structure, not a local identity claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Mitochondrial Haplogroup M7b1a1b; Y-Chromosome Haplogroup I1b-CTS10703
resultRows.description: The sample page shows final maternal and paternal haplogroup rows paired with short explanations of mtDNA and Y-DNA haplogroup formation.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public sample PDF Maternal & Paternal Haplogroups table; sample IDs differ across visible pages, so this row is a format example only.

lineageScopeSummary.autosomal: Autosomal ancestry can summarize broad reference-panel similarity when a calibrated model is supplied; this fixture does not supply calibrated percentages.
lineageScopeSummary.maternalLine: mtDNA follows one maternal line and does not represent all ancestors.
lineageScopeSummary.paternalLine: Y-DNA follows one paternal line when available; this fixture marks it unavailable.
lineageScopeSummary.sampleRows: The public sample rows show how Sequencing.com displayed ancestry composition and haplogroups in an example report. They are output-format examples, not local personal results.

whatThisDoesNotMean: This is not an exact ethnicity percentage for the local fixture.
This does not identify a precise homeland, tribe, community, nationality, or living relatives.
This is not a family-matching or genealogy-relative report.
This is not a health or disease-risk report.
This does not turn mtDNA or Y-DNA lineage evidence into overall ancestry or identity.

references.title: MedlinePlus Genetics: pros and cons of direct-to-consumer genetic testing
Genetic Ancestry with Haplogroups sample report

genotypeSummary.genotype: broad East Asian reference-panel similarity; no percentage calibration supplied
genotypeSummary.effect: The local fixture supplies broad autosomal context without calibrated ethnicity percentages.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Report as broad ancestry context only; do not convert it into exact percentages, homeland, identity, relatives, or health interpretation.

genotypeSummary.effect: The local fixture supplies a derived maternal-line haplogroup for validation.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Report as one maternal-line ancestry path only; do not treat it as overall ancestry, identity, or health status.

genotypeSummary.effect: The local fixture intentionally omits Y-DNA evidence.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Mark paternal-line haplogroup context unavailable instead of inferring it from autosomal or mtDNA evidence.

genotypeSummary.effect: The public sample demonstrates a direct maternal haplogroup summary row.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Use this as observed sample output structure only; keep it separate from the local fixture's M7b1a1 derived mtDNA call.

genotypeSummary.effect: The public sample demonstrates a direct paternal Y-DNA haplogroup summary row.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Use this as observed sample output structure only; do not infer a paternal-line haplogroup for the local fixture.

genotypeSummary.effect: The public sample demonstrates ancestry composition percentage formatting.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Exact percentages require calibrated ancestry evidence for a local run; sample percentages are not reused as personal output.

genotypeSummary.genotype: visible mtDNA marker path ending in M7b1a1b
genotypeSummary.effect: The sample marker table shows selected mitochondrial variants associated with sequential haplogroup refinement.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Summarize the visible marker path without emitting the full raw mtDNA variant list in consumer output.

genotypeSummary.genotype: visible Y-DNA marker path ending in I1b1b~ / CTS10703
genotypeSummary.effect: The sample marker table shows selected Y-chromosome variants associated with sequential haplogroup refinement.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Summarize the visible marker path without emitting the full raw Y-DNA variant list in consumer output.

missingInputs: Authenticated marketplace detail-page extraction has not been completed.
No calibrated ancestry model or reference-panel metadata is supplied for exact local percentages.
No Y-DNA paternal-line haplogroup evidence is supplied for the local fixture.
No family-matching, living-relative, migration-route, community-affiliation, or exact-homeland data is supplied.
Public sample rows are examples and must stay separate from local derived evidence.
uncertainty: Broad reference-panel similarity should not be treated as a precise ancestry percentage or identity.
Lineage haplogroups describe one inherited path and do not summarize all ancestors.
The fixture is a validation artifact, not a complete ancestry inference pipeline.
The public sample PDF demonstrates output structure and visible sample rows; it is not a personal result for this fixture.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.
The report does not emit raw SNP tables, raw mtDNA variant lists, or raw Y-DNA variant lists.
Authenticated Sequencing.com marketplace detail-page extraction is still pending.
Sample ancestry percentages and sample haplogroups are not reused as local personal conclusions.
